message:
fix(input): improve parser robustness and golden test utilities

Enhance input parser with better edge case handling and improve
golden test framework for more reliable snapshot testing.

Parser improvements:
- Better handling of malformed escape sequences
- Improved terminal input sequence parsing

Golden test utilities:
- Enhanced comparison logic
- Better error reporting for snapshot mismatches

Syncs beads issue tracker.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
